metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p == "occupation":
              return f"was a {obj.lower()}"
with:
  if p == "occupation":
              # Use a more natural verb for astronauts' roles
              return f"served as a {obj.lower()}"
Change 2: Replace:
  if p == "backuppilot":
              return f"backup pilot {obj}"
with:
  if p == "backuppilot":
              # Phrase the backup pilot relation from the mission's perspective
              return f"{obj} was the backup pilot of {subj}"
Change 3: Replace:
  if p == "leader":
              # Subject is an entity, object is a person
              return f"{obj} is the leader of {subj}"
with:
  if p == "leader":
              # Express leadership as a property of the entity
              return f"{subj} is led by {obj}"
